issues.title: [DEPLOY] Add reproducible local service deployment and operating guide
match_titles: [DEPLOY] Add reproducible local deployment and operating guide
issues.body:
## Outcome

Run Quân Sư reliably beside Mama and local Ollama on Windows and Linux.

## Scope

- Native process and Docker Compose options.
- Loopback/private network, authentication secrets, readiness, restart, resource limits, log rotation, backup boundaries, upgrade, and rollback.
- Pinned assistant package versions or service endpoints.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No public port is required.
- [ ] The service starts without a Discord token.
- [ ] Deployment identifies exact versions of all assistant contracts.
- [ ] Operators can diagnose one unavailable adapter without exposing content.

issues.title: [DEMO] Prove generic, language, game, and health end-to-end workflows
match_titles: [DEMO] Build the end-to-end language coaching workflow
[DEMO] Build the end-to-end game coaching workflow
issues.body:
## Outcome

Provide repeatable synthetic end-to-end demonstrations from Mama through Quân Sư to each approved capability.

## Scope

- Generic advisor chat.
- Language mission and correction.
- Game evidence review and training plan.
- Health workflow only after safety gates pass.
- Unavailable, timeout, cancellation, and incompatible-version examples.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Each demo records repository SHAs and contract versions.
- [ ] Demos work with deterministic fakes; optional live Ollama smoke tests are separately marked.
- [ ] No real learner, player, or health data is required.

issues.title: [RELEASE] Execute the five-repository AI ecosystem release gate
match_titles: [RELEASE] Define and execute the four-repository MVP release checklist
issues.body:
## Outcome

Release the first owner-only ecosystem only after contract, privacy, QA, deployment, backup, and rollback evidence pass.

## Scope

- Exact SHAs and package/model/prompt versions.
- Compatibility matrix.
- Live designated-guild validation through Mama.
- Restart, upgrade, rollback, and incident evidence.
- Health capability may remain disabled until its stricter gate passes.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No second AI Discord token is used.
- [ ] Every enabled capability has a tested fallback and disable switch.
- [ ] Release artifacts contain no secrets or private data.
- [ ] The previous working version can be restored.

issues.title: [MAINTENANCE] Define upgrades, compatibility windows, incidents, and adapter deprecation
issues.body:
## Outcome

Maintain Quân Sư as a stable orchestration layer while assistants, prompts, and Ollama models evolve.

## Scope

- Supported protocol and adapter versions.
- Dependency update cadence and contract canaries.
- Incident severity, disable switches, rollback triggers, and postmortems.
- Deprecation and removal policy for capabilities and operations.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No breaking adapter release is consumed without fixtures.
- [ ] Health rule/source updates follow their own review gate.
- [ ] Stale jobs, temporary files, logs, and secrets have cleanup/rotation procedures.
- [ ] Maintenance never moves specialist domain logic into the gateway.
